docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOSE DE LA TORRE FILED BY DEFENDANT DE LA TORRE JANITORIAL
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROGRESS REPORT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-02-2026 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF THE CAVALIER SF, LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DE LA TORRE JANITORIAL IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE PROGRESS REPORT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-09-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA TORRE JANITORIAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) WINDI HAZZARD FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CAVALIER SF, LLC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,100.00 FILED BY THE CAVALIER SF, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA TORRE JANITORIAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CAVALIER SF, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA TORRE JANITORIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-06-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF THE CAVALIERS SF, LLC (WINDI HAZZARD) IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DE LA TORRE JANOTORIAL (JOSE DE LA TORRE) IS PRESENT. THE PARTIES HAVE ENTERED INTO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. DEFENDANT WILL PAY $100.00 PER MONTH STARTING OCTOBER 1, 2025 AND SHOULD DEFENDANT MISS 2 CONSECUTIVE PAYMENTS WILL RESULT TO FULL PAYMENT OF THE AMOUNT OWED. CASE WILL BE CONTINUED EVERY 6 MOS UNTIL OCTOBER 2030. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
